what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for an image asset named p-18 in the design-source channel under company-info, including a blob reference, MIME type, authorship, timestamp, and a source ground-truth label.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and links fields
body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-18.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image file
Blob reference includes a content-looking hash
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured ledger metadata
Uses an image:// scheme address matching channel and path
concerns: Zero width/height suggests image dimensions were not extracted or the asset record is incomplete
No links leaves the asset isolated in the ledger
Blob hash cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A ledger stub for a design-source JPEG image with unresolved dimensions, a blob hash, and no outgoing relationships.
questions: What visual content does company-info/p-18.jpg contain?
Which system or process is meant to consume this ledger entry?
Is the blob hash expected to be validated against an actual stored file?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as a design ground-truth source record for an image; actual content is a metadata stub with zero dimensions and no relationships, so it captures identity and provenance but not image-derived detail.
intention_signals: To establish a canonical, discoverable ledger entry for a design-source image asset that records its origin, authorship, and storage reference.
novelty: The explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' provenance label and the image:// scheme address make this more than a plain filename record.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, timestamped, authorship-tagged ledger record that links a blob hash to a design-source image asset path, supporting provenance and retrieval in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata file for a design-source JPEG image asset company-info/p-18 with a blob reference, zero dimensions, no links, and a source ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to catalog and provide provenance for a design-source image in the company channel memory.
